settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your project data and preferences.

appLanguage.heading: App Language
appLanguage.description: Choose the language for Zagafy's interface — menus, buttons, and labels. This is separate from your project's writing language below and never affects your manuscript or AI output.

projectLanguage.heading: Project Language
projectLanguage.description: Set the language for your project. All AI analysis, ingestion, and assistant responses will use this language. Content will never be translated.

writerMemory.heading: Writer Memory
writerMemory.description: The AI coach builds up observations about your craft (pacing, dialogue, description, plot, voice) as you run it. The top three are folded back into future micro-prompts and coaching sessions. Browse them under <link>Writing Map</link>.
writerMemory.remembered: Currently remembered: {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}}.
writerMemory.confirmMessage: Clear all {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}} the AI coach has built up about your craft? Future suggestions will start fresh. This cannot be undone.

spellcheck.heading: Spellcheck
spellcheck.description: Use the browser's built-in spellchecker on writing surfaces. Turn this off when you're polishing dialect, made-up names, or invented vocabulary and the red squiggles get in the way.
spellcheck.roadmap: A richer grammar layer (LanguageTool) is on the roadmap — see docs/ROADMAP.md.

exportProject.heading: Export Project
exportProject.description: Download your entire Story Bible, manuscript, characters, and timeline as a JSON file. You can use this for backup or to process with other tools.

restoreProject.heading: Restore Project
restoreProject.description: Import a previously exported JSON file to restore your Story Bible. This will replace all current data.
restoreProject.confirmMessage: This will replace ALL current project data with the imported file. A backup of your current data will be saved automatically.
restoreProject.parseError: Failed to parse JSON file. Make sure it is a valid Story Bible export.
restoreProject.tooLarge: Import file is too large (max {mb} MB).

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly analytics help us understand how Zagafy is used. No manuscript content is ever collected. Session recordings mask all text.
analytics.dntNote: Your browser has Do-Not-Track enabled. Analytics are automatically disabled.
analytics.enabled: Analytics enabled. Reload for changes to take full effect.
analytics.disabled: Analytics disabled. Reload for changes to take full effect.

onboarding.heading: Onboarding Tour
onboarding.description: Replay the guided tour that introduces the main areas of Zagafy. Useful if you skipped it during setup or want a quick refresher.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.description: Permanently delete all project data from your browser's local storage. Make sure you have exported your data first if you want to keep it.
danger.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your project data from local storage. This cannot be undone. Make sure you have exported your data first.

kdp.heading: KDP Formatting Preview
kdp.noChapters: Add chapters on the Manuscript page to enable export.

blurb.heading: Back-Cover Blurb
blurb.description: Generate market-ready jacket copy / book description — a hooky, spoiler-free pitch for the back cover and your retail product page.
blurb.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

marketing.heading: Marketing / Amazon Copy
marketing.description: A full KDP listing package: product description, editorial hook, search keywords, browse categories, and A+ bullet points.
marketing.needTitle: Set a title in Story Setup to enable generation.

logline.heading: Logline & Elevator Pitch

heteronyms.heading: Alter Egos
heteronyms.explainer: An alter ego is a writing voice — a persona with its own tone, vocabulary, and pacing. Pick one in Flow mode and the AI (micro-prompts, coach, chat) shapes its suggestions to match that voice. Use them to write distinct POVs or characters in their own style. Alter egos are saved per project.
heteronyms.empty: No alter egos yet. Create one to get started.
heteronyms.deleteMessage: This alter ego will be permanently removed. If it is currently active, writing will switch back to your default voice.

consent.body: We use privacy-friendly analytics to understand how Zagafy is used and improve the experience. No manuscript content is ever collected. You can change this anytime in Settings.

about.title: About Zagafy
about.intro: Zagafy is your antiquarian narrative workshop -- a place where stories are crafted with the care and precision of a master bookbinder, supported by modern AI that understands the weight of every word you write.
about.mission1: We believe every story deserves internal consistency and depth. Too often, writers lose track of details as their manuscripts grow -- a character's eye color shifts, a timeline contradicts itself, a subplot disappears without resolution. These small fractures accumulate and weaken the reader's trust in the narrative.
about.mission2: Zagafy exists to solve that problem. By combining a thoughtful writing environment with AI that has actually read your manuscript, we give writers a creative partner that catches contradictions, remembers every detail, and suggests possibilities without overriding your voice.
about.philosophy1: We draw inspiration from the antiquarian tradition -- the idea that knowledge and stories are precious artifacts worth preserving with care. Our interface reflects this with warm parchment tones, brass accents, and typography that honors the printed word. Behind the aesthetic is a commitment to craft: every feature in Zagafy is designed to help you write better, not just faster.
about.philosophy2: Your stories belong to you. Zagafy stores manuscripts locally by default, processes AI requests without retaining your content, and never trains on your work. We are a tool in service of your creativity, nothing more.

blog.title: Blog
blog.intro: Writing craft insights, product updates, and storytelling wisdom. Coming soon.
blog.post1Excerpt: How to maintain internal consistency across sprawling fictional worlds without losing your creative momentum.
blog.post2Excerpt: Exploring the paradox of believable characters: they must be consistent enough to trust, yet contradictory enough to feel real.
blog.post3Title: Flow State and the Writer's Mind
blog.post3Excerpt: The science behind deep focus writing and how the right environment can help you access it more reliably.

features.title: Craft Better Stories
features.subtitle: Every tool in Zagafy is designed to keep your narrative consistent, your creativity flowing, and your characters alive.
features.manuscriptEditorDesc: Write with continuity awareness. The editor keeps track of every character, location, and timeline detail across your entire manuscript, surfacing relevant context as you draft new scenes. No more flipping back through chapters to remember what color the door was.
features.flowModeDesc: Enter deep focus writing with a distraction-free environment designed for sustained creative output. Flow Mode strips away everything except your words, tracks your sprint progress, and gently nudges you to keep momentum without breaking your concentration.
features.aiCopilotDesc: Get unstuck with context-aware suggestions. The copilot has read your entire story and can brainstorm plot directions, draft dialogue, describe settings, or help you work through structural problems -- all while respecting your unique voice and established canon.
features.storyBrainDesc: Catch inconsistencies automatically. Story Brain continuously analyzes your manuscript for contradictions in character details, timeline errors, and factual drift. It flags problems before your beta readers do, saving you painful revision cycles.
features.canonSystemDesc: Lock story facts and prevent contradictions. When you establish that a character has blue eyes or that the war ended in 1847, the Canon System treats those as immutable truths and warns you -- and the AI -- whenever something conflicts with established canon.
features.characterChatDesc: Interview your characters to discover their depths. Engage in freeform conversation with any character from your story. They respond based on their established personality, backstory, and current arc position -- helping you uncover motivations you had not considered.

pricing.title: Plans for Every Writer
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you are ready. No surprise fees, cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for trying Zagafy on a single project.

writer.name: Writer
writer.description: For dedicated writers who need room to grow.

author.name: Author
author.description: Everything you need to go from draft to publication.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Zagafy collects minimal data. We store your authentication credentials (managed by Clerk) and basic usage analytics via PostHog. Analytics are opt-in -- you can decline tracking at any time through the consent banner, and we will respect your choice immediately.
privacy.s2Body: Your manuscripts are stored locally on your device by default. If you enable cloud sync, your story data is encrypted in transit and at rest on our servers. You can delete your cloud data at any time from the Settings page, and we will purge it within 30 days.
privacy.s3Body: When you use AI features (Copilot, Story Brain, Character Chat), relevant portions of your manuscript are sent to the Google Gemini API for processing. Google does not store your content after processing is complete and does not use it for model training. We send only the minimum context necessary for each request.
privacy.s4Body: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, or export your personal data. You may also object to processing or request restriction. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@zagafy.com and we will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s5Body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Analytics cookies are only set if you opt in. We do not use advertising cookies or share data with third-party advertisers.
privacy.s6Body: For questions about this policy, contact us at privacy@zagafy.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: Zagafy is a web-based narrative writing platform that provides manuscript editing, AI writing assistance, story consistency analysis, and related tools. The service is provided "as is" and may be updated, modified, or discontinued at our discretion.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You agree not to use the platform to generate content that is unlawful, harmful, or infringes on the rights of others. You must be at least 13 years old to use Zagafy.
terms.s3Body: You retain full ownership of all content you create using Zagafy. Your manuscripts, characters, outlines, and other creative work belong entirely to you. We claim no rights over your content and will never use it for training AI models or any other purpose without your explicit consent.
terms.s4Body: Content suggested by AI features is provided as creative assistance. You are responsible for reviewing, editing, and accepting any AI suggestions before incorporating them into your work. We make no guarantees about the originality or accuracy of AI-generated content.
terms.s5Body: Zagafy is provided without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We are not liable for any loss of data, manuscripts, or creative work. We strongly recommend maintaining local backups of your important manuscripts. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the service in the preceding 12 months.
terms.s6Body: You may cancel your account at any time from the Settings page. Upon cancellation, you will have 30 days to export your data before it is permanently deleted from our servers. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s7Body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@zagafy.com.

docs.title: Help Documentation
docs.intro: Everything you need to know about using Zagafy.
docs.noResults: No sections match your filter. Try a different search term.
docs.gettingStartedContent:
Zagafy is your antiquarian narrative workshop -- a writing environment built for novelists, screenwriters, and storytellers who care about consistency and craft. When you first sign up, you will land on the Library page where all your stories live.

To create your first story, click the "New Story" button. You can start from scratch or use the Genesis wizard to build a structured foundation with characters, settings, and plot outlines. Once your story is created, you will be taken to the Manuscript editor where the real writing begins.

Zagafy saves your work locally by default. If you enable cloud sync, your manuscripts are available across all your devices.
docs.genesisContent:
The Genesis wizard is your story's origin point. It walks you through a structured process to establish the foundational elements of your narrative before you write a single chapter.

During Genesis, you will define your story's genre, setting, time period, and core premise. You will create initial characters with personality traits, backstories, and relationships. The wizard also helps you outline major plot arcs and establish the canon facts that the AI will reference throughout your writing process.

You can revisit Genesis at any time to add new characters or update your story's foundational details.
docs.manuscriptContent:
The Manuscript editor is where you write and organize your chapters. It provides a clean, distraction-minimal writing surface with your story's context always accessible in the sidebar.

Chapters can be reordered by dragging, and you can split or merge chapters as your structure evolves. The editor supports rich text formatting, inline comments, and version history so you can track how your manuscript has changed over time.

Word count targets can be set per chapter or for the entire manuscript, giving you clear progress indicators as you draft.
docs.flowModeContent:
Flow Mode is a deep focus writing environment that strips away everything except your words. When you enter Flow Mode, the interface dims to a single column of text with a gentle progress indicator.

You can set sprint targets by word count or time. Flow Mode tracks your writing velocity and streaks, helping you build a consistent writing habit. A subtle ambient sound option is available to help maintain concentration.

To enter Flow Mode, click the lightning bolt icon in the Manuscript editor or use the keyboard shortcut.
docs.aiCopilotContent:
The AI Copilot is your context-aware writing assistant. Unlike generic AI tools, the Copilot has read your entire manuscript and understands your characters, plot, setting, and established canon.

You can ask the Copilot to brainstorm plot directions, draft dialogue, describe settings, identify pacing issues, or help you work through structural problems. It responds with suggestions that respect your story's established facts and your unique voice.

The Copilot is available through the chat panel on the right side of the Manuscript editor. Your conversation history is preserved per story.
docs.storyBrainContent:
Story Brain is Zagafy's automatic consistency checker. It continuously analyzes your manuscript for contradictions in character details, timeline errors, factual drift, and unresolved plot threads.

When Story Brain detects a potential issue, it surfaces a notification with the specific chapters and passages involved. You can dismiss false positives, mark issues as intentional, or navigate directly to the relevant text to make corrections.

Story Brain runs in the background and updates its analysis as you write. You can also trigger a full manuscript scan from the Story Brain dashboard.
docs.canonSystemContent:
The Canon System lets you lock story facts so they become immutable truths in your narrative. When you establish that a character has blue eyes or that the capital city is named Aldenmere, the Canon System treats these as ground truth.

If you or the AI ever contradict a canon fact, the system will flag the inconsistency immediately. Canon entries can be created manually or promoted from Story Brain suggestions.

You can organize canon entries by category -- characters, locations, timeline, rules of the world -- and export your entire canon as a reference document.
docs.heteronymsContent:
Heteronyms are writing personas you can adopt within Zagafy. Inspired by the literary tradition of Fernando Pessoa, each heteronym has its own voice, style preferences, and writing tendencies.

When you write under a heteronym, the AI adjusts its suggestions to match that persona's style. This is useful for authors who write across genres or who want to experiment with different narrative voices within the same project.

You can create and switch between heteronyms from the Settings page. Each heteronym maintains its own style profile and writing history.
docs.syncDevicesContent:
By default, Zagafy stores your manuscripts locally in your browser. This means your data never leaves your device unless you choose to enable cloud sync.

Cloud sync, powered by Clerk authentication, keeps your stories, settings, and preferences synchronized across all your devices. Changes are merged automatically, and conflict resolution preserves both versions when simultaneous edits occur.

You can enable or disable cloud sync at any time from the Settings page. Disabling sync does not delete your cloud data -- you can remove it separately if desired.
docs.billingContent:
Zagafy offers three plans: Free, Writer ($9/month), and Author ($19/month). The Free plan includes one story and 50 AI requests per day. Writer adds unlimited stories, cloud sync, and export features. Author includes collaboration tools and priority AI.

You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time from the Settings page. When you downgrade, you retain access to your current plan until the end of your billing cycle.

All payments are processed securely. We do not store your payment card details directly.
docs.troubleshootingContent:
If the AI Copilot is not responding, check your internet connection and ensure you have not exceeded your daily AI request limit. Free accounts are limited to 50 requests per day.

If your manuscript is not saving, try refreshing the page. Zagafy auto-saves every 30 seconds, but a manual save can be triggered with Ctrl+S (or Cmd+S on Mac). If cloud sync is enabled and not working, try signing out and back in.

For persistent issues, clear your browser cache and reload. If problems continue, contact support at help@zagafy.com with a description of the issue and your browser version.
docs.privacySecurityContent:
Zagafy is built with privacy as a default. Manuscripts are stored locally unless you opt into cloud sync. Analytics via PostHog are opt-in and can be disabled at any time through the consent banner.

When you use AI features, relevant portions of your manuscript are sent to the Google Gemini API for processing. Google does not retain your content after the request is complete and does not use it for training.

All data in transit is encrypted via TLS. Cloud-stored manuscripts are encrypted at rest. You can delete all your data at any time from the Settings page.

tour.manuscript: Your manuscript lives here. Write, organize chapters, and build your story scene by scene.
tour.flow: Flow mode for deep writing. A distraction-free environment that tracks your writing streaks.
tour.assistant: AI copilot for stuck moments. Get suggestions, brainstorm ideas, and overcome writer’s block.
tour.storyBrain: Story Brain catches inconsistencies. It watches your canon, timeline, and characters for conflicts.
tour.settings: Settings, sync, and export. Manage your project, language preferences, and data backups.

comments.deleteMessage: This comment and its replies will be permanently deleted.
comments.orphanedExplanation: The text these comments were anchored to no longer exists. Resolve or delete them.
comments.shortcutHint: Select text and press Ctrl/⌘+Shift+C to comment.

collab.title: Collaboration
collab.description: Share this project with other Zagafy users. Editors can make changes; readers can only view.
collab.emailRequired: Enter an email address to invite a collaborator.
collab.noCollaborators: No collaborators yet. Invite someone to share this story.
collab.syncFirst: Sync this project first — collaboration becomes available once it has been pushed to the cloud.
collab.removeMessage: {name} will lose access to this story.
collab.noShared: No stories have been shared with you yet.
collab.leaveMessage: You will lose access to “{title}” unless the owner invites you again.
collab.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
